description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run tests that runs on every push. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest) and Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10) in parallel. For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install pytest and project dependencies, and run pytest.
